fields.description: Select the calendar month this projection applies to. Only one projection is allowed per month + year + warehouse combination.
fields.label: Projection Month
fields.options:
January
February
March
April
May
June
July
August
September
October
November
December

fields.description: Enter the 4-digit year this projection applies to (e.g., 2026). Only one projection is allowed per month + year + warehouse combination.
fields.label: Projection Year

fields.description: Timestamp of the last time the Projection Automation engine ran for this document (daily 02:00 AM job or manual trigger). If blank, the engine has not yet run for this projection.
fields.label: Last Automation Run

fields.description: Add each item the production team should target for this month. Duplicate items are not allowed. Each item’s projected quantity is expressed in both the selected UOM and the item’s base stock UOM.
fields.label: Projected Items

fields.description: Warehouse this projection is scoped to. Combined with month + year, this must be unique — the same warehouse cannot have two non-cancelled projections for the same period. The Production Plan Automation also uses this as the target warehouse when creating Production Plans.
fields.label: Source Warehouse
